summary.key_theme: 比特幣價格在 75,000 美元關卡面臨強大阻力，加上聯準會利率政策不確定性與 MicroStrategy 持倉規模競爭，導致 IBIT 近期面臨顯著賣壓與波動。

bullish.title: Bitcoin ETFs Hit 6 Straight Days Of Inflows: Why Is BTC Going Up Again?
bullish.reason: 連續 6 個交易日的淨流入顯示機構投資者對 IBIT 等現貨 ETF 的需求依然強勁，為價格提供底部支撐。

bullish.title: Shares of crypto-related companies are trading higher amid ongoing volatility. The price of Bitcoin rose to almost $74,000.
bullish.reason: 比特幣價格一度逼近 74,000 美元，帶動相關加密貨幣資產與 ETF 的短期上漲情緒。

bullish.title: Should You Bet on the Recent Rally in Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs?
bullish.reason: 探討近期比特幣 ETF 的漲勢，雖然市場存在分歧，但該報導肯定了 ETF 作為投資工具的市場熱度。

bullish.title: Bitcoin: The Four-Year Cycle Is A Coincidence, And I'm Adding On The Weakness
bullish.reason: 分析師認為比特幣已轉向機構化交易，建議在價格疲軟時加碼，長期看好其作為高貝塔值資產的表現。

bearish.title: EXCLUSIVE: Bitcoin ETFs Under Pressure — Cyber Hornet CEO Explains The Volatility Gap Between IBIT And BBB
bearish.reason: IBIT 在 2026 年下跌約 21%，表現遜於同類產品，顯示其在市場波動中面臨較大的拋售壓力。

bearish.title: Bitcoin Down 2% After $75,000 Rejection: Why Is It Going Down?
bearish.reason: 比特幣無法突破 75,000 美元關鍵心理關卡，導致市場信心受挫，直接影響 IBIT 的淨值表現。

bearish.title: Bitcoin Vulnerable: Fed May Signal Higher-For-Longer
bearish.reason: 聯準會可能維持高利率的預期，增加了比特幣等風險資產的下行風險，對 IBIT 構成宏觀利空。

bearish.title: MicroStrategy could surpass BlackRock's Bitcoin holdings within a week
bearish.reason: MicroStrategy 持倉量逼近 BlackRock，市場關注焦點轉移，可能導致部分資金從 IBIT 流向 MSTR。

bearish.title: Shares of crypto-linked stocks are trading lower amid a drop in Bitcoin ahead of the Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision.
bearish.reason: 聯準會利率決策前夕的市場不確定性，導致加密貨幣相關股票與 ETF 普遍走低。

bearish.title: Does This 1 New Trend Mean You Should Sell Gold and Buy Bitcoin Right Now?
bearish.reason: 討論資金在黃金與比特幣之間的輪動，若市場轉向避險，可能對 IBIT 的資金流入造成負面影響。

bearish.title: JPMorgan Flags Sharp Divergence Between Bitcoin and Gold ETF Flows Since Iran War
bearish.reason: 摩根大通指出地緣政治風險下資金流向的轉變，顯示比特幣 ETF 在避險需求上仍具不確定性。

neutral.title: The S&P 500 Is Down 2.5% But These 3 Bitcoin ETFs Didn’t Get the Memo
neutral.reason: 報導指出比特幣 ETF 與美股大盤走勢脫鉤，反映其作為獨立資產類別的特性，無明顯多空指向。

neutral.title: The Biggest Bitcoin ETFs As Prices Hold At $71,000
neutral.reason: 僅為市場現狀盤點，描述比特幣價格在 71,000 美元震盪時的 ETF 市場概況。

neutral.title: BTCI: Squeezing Yield With This 'Bitcoin-Adjacent' Income ETF
neutral.reason: 介紹另一款高收益比特幣相關 ETF，對 IBIT 本身無直接影響，僅屬同業產品分析。

neutral.title: What is Strategy’s STRC and will it help Saylor overtake BlackRock’s $55bn Bitcoin stockpile?
neutral.reason: 深入探討 MicroStrategy 的策略工具，補充了關於持倉競爭的背景資訊，屬中性報導。

neutral.title: Bitcoin Morning Strength
neutral.reason: 描述比特幣 24 小時交易特性下的盤中表現，屬於技術性觀察。

neutral.title: Strategy Just 23,000 Bitcoin Away From Surpassing BlackRock As Largest Holder
neutral.reason: 數據更新報導，指出 MicroStrategy 與 BlackRock 的持倉差距，為市場已知事實的陳述。
